entries.title: Acceptance and Evidence Reconciliation Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level design for the acceptance and evidence reconciliation flow that keeps acceptance contracts, validator expectations, validation evidence, and traceability joins aligned.

entries.title: Command Documentation and Lookup Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level design for a human-readable command-page family under docs/commands and a machine-readable command index under core/control_plane/indexes/commands.

entries.title: Compact Document Authoring and Tracking Design
entries.summary: Defines the design for making authored templates and generated planning trackers compact by default while preserving governed machine-readable authority.

entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Control Plane Example Validation Hardening.

entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Coordination Projection Source Reuse.

entries.title: Core Export Hardening Design
entries.summary: Defines the follow-up architecture needed to make output-directory sync runs dependency-correct, restore accurate command implementation metadata, and tighten the public export-safe boundary around repo-specific services.

entries.title: Core Export-Ready Architecture Design
entries.summary: Defines the in-repo architecture needed to separate reusable core behavior from WatchTowerPlan repo-operations, reduce maintenance fan-out, and publish generic pack-facing contracts.

entries.title: Core Python Workspace and Harness Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level technical design for the consolidated Python workspace under core/python and the first functional boundaries of the core helper and harness package.

entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Data Contract Example Operationalization Alignment.

entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Documentation Family Lookup and README Template Alignment.

entries.title: End-to-End Repository Rationalization Design
entries.summary: Defines the review-backed design for documentation link guardrails, closeout-consistent derived metadata, external pack validation seams, and smaller query CLI modules.

entries.title: Foundation Scope and EntryPoint Realignment Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the design for separating current repository scope from future product narrative and for keeping root entrypoints thin and explicit.

entries.title: GitHub Collaboration Scaffolding
entries.summary: Defines the hosted GitHub intake, pull request, and project-field scaffolding that complements the repo-local planning and task model.

entries.title: GitHub Task Push Sync
entries.summary: Defines the first push-only sync from local task records to GitHub issues and optional project items while preserving local task authority.

entries.title: Governed Front Matter Directory Canonicalization Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Governed Front Matter Directory Canonicalization.

entries.title: Initiative Closeout and Planning Trackers
entries.summary: Defines the first initiative closeout model, its traceability fields, and the generated planning trackers that mirror initiative outcome for humans.

entries.title: Internal Project Code Review and Hardening Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the code-review-backed design for lifecycle sync completeness across traced scaffold writes and initiative closeout.

entries.title: Internal Project Code Review Follow-up Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the follow-up design for bootstrap decision-template validity, decision-semantic enforcement, and bootstrap-phase coordination semantics.

entries.title: Internal Project Review and Hardening Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the review-backed design for validation-compatible planning bootstrap output and canonical coordination payload serialization.

entries.title: Internal Project Standards Review and Hardening Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Internal Project Standards Review and Hardening.

entries.title: Local Task Tracking and GitHub Sync Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level design for local-first task records, a generated task tracker, a generated task index, and later GitHub sync support.

entries.title: Machine-First Coordination Surface Design
entries.summary: Defines the derived coordination index and compact human byproduct needed to make one always-useful coordination surface the default start-here view for planning state.

entries.title: Python Validator Execution Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level technical design for a Python validation layer that reads the authored validator registry from core/control_plane and executes validators deterministically against governed artifacts.

entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for converging governed reference authoring rules and workflow additional-load enforcement.
